clause_text: HB 1384 enrolled as a Chapter of the 2026 Acts of Assembly
Proposing an amendment to Section 6 of Article II and adding a section numbered 6 to the Schedule
Agreed to by House of Delegates 2024-03-11 (2024 Regular Session)
2025 House of Delegates general election held
November 4 2025 general election of the House of Delegates
Early voting for 2025 general election begins September 19 2025
Official election day November 4 2025
Agreed to by House and Senate 2026-01-16 (2026 Regular Session)
Final passage January 16 2026
Referendum early voting begins March 6 2026
Referendum election day April 21 2026
Constitutional amendment question submitted to voters
circuit court held the first passage was void ab initio
General Assembly failed to comply with Section 30-13
Proposing an amendment to Section 6 of Article II
adding a section numbered 6 to the Schedule
limited to making such modifications between January 1 2025 and October 31 2030
in the event that any State of the United States of America conducts a redistricting
Ballot question does not reference the January 2025 through October 2030 limitation
Ballot question does not reference the conditional trigger of another state's action
Circuit Court of the City of Richmond shall have exclusive jurisdiction
any proceeding pending in any other court shall be transferred
First passage March 11 2024 (day 70) precedes both early voting September 19 2025 (day 627) and election day November 4 2025 (day 673)
